title: Analytics - Firmware Update
scenario: Firebase DFU analytics dashboard fails to display firmware update event details (Success, Device Name, Versions, Progress, Error Description) after completing a DFU on a Poly headset
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected.
3. Go to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Firmware Update.
4. Initiate a Device Firmware Update (DFU) on the connected headset.
5. Wait for the firmware update process to complete successfully.
6. After the update completes, navigate to the Firebase Analytics dashboard for the Poly Studio Mobile app.
7. Verify that the Firebase page contains the following default elements: Graph, Events in last 30 minutes, Event count by Country/Gender, Events per session, App Version, App Build, App Environment.

8. Verify that the Firebase page also contains the following custom event parameters: Success, Device Name, Firmware Update Status, Current/Target Headset Version, Current/Target Charge Case Version, Current/Target Charge Stand Version, Current/Target Language ID, Target Language Name, Headset Progress, Charge Case Progress, Charge Stand Progress, Headset/Charge Case/Charge Stand Update Time in Seconds, and Error Description.
9. Wait a few hours after the DFU completion.
10. Check the event counts for the firmware update-related elements (e.g., Success, Device Name, Firmware Update Status, etc.) in the Firebase dashboard.
expected: The Firebase dashboard displays all default elements (Graph, Events in last 30 minutes, Event count by Country/Gender, Events per session, App Version, App Build, App Environment) and the custom firmware update parameters (Success, Device Name, Firmware Update Status, Current/Target Headset Version, Current/Target Charge Case Version, Current/Target Charge Stand Version, Current/Target Language ID, Target Language Name, Headset Progress, Charge Case Progress, Charge Stand Progress, Headset/Charge Case/Charge Stand Update Time in Seconds, Error Description). After a few hours, the event counts for the firmware update-related elements increase.
